widgets_values:
## MODELS USED IN THIS WORKFLOW

### Load Diffusion Model
[⬇ Download krea2_turbo_bf16.safetensors · 26.3 GB](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Krea-2/resolve/main/diffusion_models/krea2_turbo_bf16.safetensors)

*Place in: ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models*

### Load CLIP
[⬇ Download qwen3vl_4b_bf16.safetensors · 8.9 GB](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Krea-2/resolve/main/text_encoders/qwen3vl_4b_bf16.safetensors)

*Place in: ComfyUI/models/text_encoders*

### Load VAE
[⬇ Download qwen_image_vae.safetensors · 254 MB](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Krea-2/resolve/main/vae/qwen_image_vae.safetensors)

*Place in: ComfyUI/models/vae*

These three run the workflow as-is. The purple LoRA node ships **bypassed**, so you don't need
anything else to hit Queue.

### Optional — Realism Engine LoRA (the purple node, ships OFF)
[⬇ Download Realism Engine for Krea 2 · civitai](https://civitai.com/models/3109006)

*Place in: ComfyUI/models/loras, then enable the node: select it + **Ctrl+B**, or right-click →
Set Mode → Always. Cleaner skin; every "Realism Engine 0.4" example was rendered with it on.*

⚠️ After placing the files, restart ComfyUI or refresh model lists with the **R** shortcut.

**Custom Nodes:** none — 100% ComfyUI core nodes.

**Requirements:** Apple Silicon Mac. The bf16 UNet wants ~48 GB (peak ~26 GB). Low on RAM? Swap in `krea2_turbo_fp8_scaled` (~13 GB) — needs torch 2.11 + the ComfyUI-AppleSilicon-FP8 node (github.com/pawel-mazurkiewicz/ComfyUI-AppleSilicon-FP8). fp8 = less memory, same speed, same look.
nodes.title: Models & downloads

widgets_values:
## RECIPE & MAC GOTCHAS

**Locked recipe:** 20 steps · cfg 1.0 · euler · simple · denoise 1.0
Negative = ConditioningZeroOut of the positive — at cfg 1 negatives are **dead**, don't write them.

**Steps:** 20 is the balance point (near-identical to 26 on most scenes). Bump to 26 for max
detail on tight portraits; drop to 8-12 for fast seed hunting. Composition shifts a little
across big step changes, so re-check the final.

**MPS rules:**
- `batch_size` MUST stay **1** (queue many *separate* jobs instead — that's fine). The batch_size WIDGET breaks on MPS: batch > 1 = mostly static frames + possible OOM
- first render cold-loads ~26 GB, keep ComfyUI warm between renders

**Prompting at cfg 1:** the positive prompt is the only steering. Lead with a photographic
framing (`sharp high-detail realistic photograph, natural skin texture with fine pores` /
`realistic candid iphone flash photo at night`) — NOT `amateur smartphone photo, unedited`,
which actively softens. State the expression explicitly. Pin ethnicity/age or they drift when
you change any setting. `clear complexion, few freckles` cleans up freckle-heavy skin.

**Realism Engine (purple node) — ships OFF (bypassed):**
- **Enable with the mouse: right-click → Set Mode → Always** (or select it and press **Ctrl+B**).
  Same keys toggle it back off. NEVER set strength to 0.0 on MPS — a zeroed LoRA NaNs the model
  and renders pure black, so bypass instead of zeroing.
- **0.4** is the sweet spot for clean skin. It doesn't fix freckles alone (use the prompt term);
  above ~0.5 it drifts unpinned identity attributes.
nodes.title: Recipe & Mac gotchas
Realism Engine 0.4 (optional, ships OFF — Ctrl+B to enable)

widgets_values: a woman in her late 20s, candid photo, waist-up, sitting at a cafe window table, soft smile, oversized cream knit sweater, morning light through the window, shallow depth of field
nodes.title: Prompt (the ONLY steering at cfg 1)
